REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING AND SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT BASED ON DEFECTIVE NOTICE AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION; DECLARATION OF ANTHONY DIPIERO FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
MEMORANDUM IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING AND SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT BASED ON DEFECTIVE NOTICE AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HYUN LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT WITH LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO 7/14/11, FOR OPPOSING PARTY TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION PAPERS, PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6(B), NO LATER THAN 7/5/11. COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, COURT REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-01-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HYUN JOO LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT BASED ON DEFECTIVE NOTICE AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS VACATED AND DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER BY JULY 18, 2011. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT HYUN JOO LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT BASED ON DEFECTIVE NOTICE AND FOR LEAVE TO DEFEND ACTION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS VACATED AND DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HIS PROPOSED ANSWER BY JULY 18, 2011. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-01-2011 Continued To Jul-14-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT HYUN LEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT, DEFAULT JUDGMENT WITH LEAVE TO DEFEND.
Continued to 7/14/11, for opposing party to provide Department 301 with courtesy copies of opposition papers, per SF Local Rule 2.6(b), no later than 7/5/11. Courtesy copies to reflect the new hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Court Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
